data.name: 嘘, 美女拍摄中
data.detailed_description:
遊戲介紹

“OMG!!!!! 這到底是誰做的!!!!!!"

完蛋了，大出包！我根本就是行走的災難現場！

不只被貼上「空降部隊」的標籤，還失誤闖進前輩換衣服的地方、不小心撞到課長的屁股…

現在連工作上都搞砸了 ㅠㅜ！

以前只顧著追逐時尚，失去了朋友、工作、存款

好不容易才進了這家公司，絕對不能就這樣被開除！

我努力把握機會，累積前輩們的好感度，拍出神等級的作品，一定要在這家公司活下去！

呃，以資深宅宅的審美來看，這種衣服真的會爆紅的！

當我開始向前輩們展現我的想法後，氣氛好像有點不一樣了…？

太好了，就這樣一路邁向成功吧！

努力提升好感度，拍出超棒的照片，同時解鎖精美的劇照！

要專注在工作，還是要讓心動越界，將完全取決於你的選擇！

現在，開始你的第一個上班日吧！ 📸

角色介紹

周雅凛—穿搭Youtuber，挑剔的穿搭網紅

我是網紅周雅凜耶。這種事也要我親自做嗎？

擁有 50 萬粉絲，紅遍大街小巷的頂級YouTuber！

她的美貌及驕傲自尊，總讓你手忙腳亂

在光鮮亮麗的流量光環底下… 或許藏著她不為人知的反差萌？

成恩熙—行銷組組長，性感的工作狂

我不會對新人心軟，看不順眼就直接開除

工作能力強大的完美主義者

面對氣場強大的她，負責拍攝的你真能夠平安無事嗎？

不過，聽說她對「工作能力強的男人」卻意外地沒抵抗力…？

鈴木美奈—穿搭Youtuber，火辣性感的日韓混血模特兒

「智宇歐巴，你簡直就像韓劇男主角！超帥的！」

憑藉火辣身材征服鏡頭的人氣 YouTuber

在拍攝現場就開啟撒嬌滿點模式，但一碰上宿敵周雅凛，立刻擦出火花四濺！

一句稱讚就害羞到臉紅心跳的可愛反轉！

姜惠媛—設計組前輩，初戀情人

「智宇果然還是適合設計組！要不要來我們團隊呢？」

大學時期曾經暗戀的學姊

"偶爾穿著火辣的衣服，丟出曖昧的提問——

這場初戀的火花，還能重新點燃嗎？"

朴智英—人資部新人，可愛的Vlogger

「哥哥，你還以為我是小孩子嗎？我已經是大人了！」

表面上是親切可愛的小妹妹，私下卻是能悄悄動用人資部資源的權力者！

總愛跟前跟後對你找碴，但又常常凸槌露出迷糊本性…

時而精明、時而傻氣的她，你敢把心交給她嗎？

五位魅力爆棚的女主角，誰能讓你怦然心動、墜入愛河？

還是說…你的真命天女，另有其人？！

遊戲魅力亮點

✨沉浸式第一人稱視角戀愛模擬遊戲

  • 從踏入公司的第一步到每個心跳加速的邂逅，你都將透過新人金智宇的雙眼親歷一切

  • 以第一視角對話、抉擇，與她們擦出職場火花與情感漩渦

  • 就像真的身處公司中，親身參與拍攝現場的每個環節，獲得超真實沉浸感

  • 你的每個微小選擇，都將改變彼此的關係，左右故事的緊張氛圍

📸 享受FMV 帶來的真實拍攝感

  • 在拍攝現場，不只是旁觀者！

  • 透過迷你遊戲，親手拍攝各位女主角吧！

  • 你拍下的每張照片都會存進珍藏圖鑑中，解鎖獨家影片、收藏寫真畫報、以及特殊 CG 畫面！

💖魅力四射的女主角們陸續登場！

  • 主任、組長、人氣 YouTuber、火辣前輩…… 各種職位應有盡有！

  • 年上姐姐、年下妹妹、同齡朋友，全方位類型女角將主動展開攻勢！

  • 每位女主角都擁有專屬路線與隱藏的秘密，對你展開積極的反應

🔑 額外樂趣 — 收集與分支故事

  • 經由拍攝獲得的精美照片與解鎖的獨家影片，都會成為你的遊戲成就

  • 多重故事線與隱藏結局，讓你能一玩再玩，發掘全新的路線與隱藏的結局

  • 就算失誤也別擔心——重新挑戰，親手打造獨屬於你的戀愛故事！

團隊介紹

大家好！

我們是互動遊戲開發商 StoryTaco

懷著無比激動與欣喜的心情，在此向您介紹我們與影像制作公司 WhyNot Media 的首度合作企劃

由於各位玩家長久以來對我們 FMV 系列的熱烈支持，才能夠推出這次的全新作品

真的非常感謝大家

本次新作以「拍攝穿搭LookBook」概念為核心，完成更細膩生動，且具備沉浸感的劇本

主題以公司內部拍攝現場為背景的特別舞台上

期待由你直接主導選擇，盡情感受這段專屬且獨一無二的劇情體驗

我們會盡最大努力，將各位的無限想像、熱切期盼，以及所有的渴望，呈現於遊戲之中，打造最棒的遊戲體驗

往後也請不吝給予我們寶貴的支持與意見，我們會以持續進步的面貌來回報

已經開始期待能和各位玩家們一起迎來的下一個故事

再次衷心感謝，也請大家盡情享受這場充滿心動的拍攝之旅吧！

data.short_description: 「叫我拍 Lookbook?! 不是吧?!」 YouTube 公司「RazaWorks」的新人金智宇， 竟然從報到第一天，就要擔任幫頂尖 YouTuber 和上司們拍攝的重責大任？！ 燈光下交錯的目光、祕密的請求，以及禁忌的浪漫 一次又一次的拍攝種…連他們的心也跟著動搖
data.supported_languages:
英文, 韓文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 印尼語, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Discrete graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 30 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 or AMD equivalent or above
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Discrete graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 30 GB 可用空間

data.name: Heroines Through My Lens
data.detailed_description:
About the Game

“OMG!!!!! Who did this?!”

Utter chaos. Everything’s a disaster!

As if being a nepotism hire wasn’t bad enough—you accidentally walk in on a senior changing, bump into your manager’s butt,

and now you’ve messed up an important project, too?!

After losing your friends, your job, and your money chasing your fashion dreams,

you can’t afford to fail again!

Raise your reputation, nail every shoot, and survive this wild workplace!

“From an otaku’s perspective, this outfit would totally blow up online!”

One word from you and the mood begins to change.

Maybe success isn’t that far off after all?

Earn affection, take the perfect photos, and collect beautiful shots!

Whether you focus on career or romance, your choices decide your future.

Now, it’s time to begin your first day at Lazaworks! 🎥

Heroines

Joo Ah-reum — Influencer / Sharp-Tongued Diva

“I’m the influencer Joo Ah-reum. Do I really have to do this?”

A stunning content creator with half a million followers and an ego to match.

She’ll drive you crazy...

But behind her pride, there’s a surprisingly pure heart.

Sung Jun-hee — Marketing Manager / Fierce Workaholic

“I don’t fall for new hire. If I don’t like someone, I fire them.”

A charismatic perfectionist known for her stellar work ethic.

You’re assigned to photograph her — will you make it out alive?

Rumor has it she has a soft spot for men who get the job done…

Mina Suzuki — Lookbook YouTuber / Sultry Model

“Jiwoo, you’re like a K-drama lead! So cool!”

A top YouTuber who owns the camera with her charm and confidence.

Sweet and bubbly on set, but fierce when facing her rival, Ju Ahreum.

One compliment from you, though… and she turns bright red.

Kang Hye-won — Design Senior / Your First Love

“Jiwoo, you’d fit perfectly on our team. Want to transfer?”

Your college senior and first love.

Sometimes she appears in daring outfits, asking teasing questions…

Could this be the spark that reignites your past feelings?

Park Ji-young — HR Intern / Adorable Vlogger

“Oppa still treats me like a kid, but I’m an adult now!”

Cute and approachable, but not afraid to flex her HR authority when she needs to.

She’s your clingy yet clumsy best friend...

but can you really trust her?

Five women, each with their own unique charm, secrets, and stories.

Who will you fall for — or will your heart choose someone else entirely?

Features

✨ Immersive First-Person Romance Simulation

  • Experience the entire story through Jiwoo Kim’s eyes.

  • Interact, choose, and navigate realistic workplace moments.

  • Every decision you make shapes relationships, tension, and outcomes.

📸 FMV Lookbook Photography Gameplay

  • You’re not just watching — you’re the photographer!

  • Play interactive mini-games to capture stunning shots of the heroines.

  • Your photos unlock bonus videos, CGs, and exclusive lookbook collections.

💖 Diverse Heroines, Dynamic Choices

  • From seniors to influencers, every heroine reacts to your choices.

  • Each has her own route, secrets, and personality —

  • giving you multiple ways to fall in love (or get in trouble).

🔑 Multiple Endings & Collections

  • Gather lookbooks, unlock bonus videos, and replay routes to uncover hidden endings.

  • Made a mistake? Don’t worry — try again and craft your own perfect story.

About the Team

Hi there!

We’re Storytaco, an interactive game development studio.

This project marks our first collaboration with WHYNOT Media,

and we’re beyond thrilled to bring you this brand-new FMV experience.

Thanks to your amazing support for our previous FMV series,

we were able to take storytelling and immersion to the next level.

This time, we’ve focused on the detailed world of lookbook production —
a vivid and realistic workplace where your choices truly matter.

We poured our hearts into every scene to meet your expectations, imagination, and desires.

Please continue to share your love and feedback —

we’ll keep growing and creating the stories you want to play.

Thank you, and enjoy your first day at Lazaworks! 💼✨

we’ll keep growing and creating the stories you want to play.

Thank you, and enjoy your first day at Lazaworks! 💼✨
data.short_description: “Me? A lookbook shoot?!” New hire Kim Jiwoo joins YouTube studio Lazaworks and gets thrown into photographing top youtubers and his own bosses on day one. Under the bright lights, stolen glances turn into secret favors and forbidden romances. The more you shoot, the more hearts stolen.
data.supported_languages:
English, Korean*, Spanish - Latin America, Indonesian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Discrete graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 30 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10/Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 or AMD equivalent or above
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Discrete graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 30 GB available space
